name: cim-rdf-lens
description: Shows relationships between rdf:about blocks and rdf:resource references as stacked color bars in the code gutter.

cimRdfLens.enabled.description: Show bars in the code gutter.

cimRdfLens.palette.description: Colors for the objects. Empty list falls back to the built-in palette.

cimRdfLens.ancestorOpacity.description: Opacity of ancestor bars. Default 1: same color as the source block. Lower values blend with the background and make matching harder.

cimRdfLens.barWidth.description: Width of a bar relative to its column (1 = no gap).

cimRdfLens.maxColumns.description: Maximum number of bars drawn side by side. Deeper chains are truncated in the middle.

cimRdfLens.underlineIds.description: Underline UUIDs in the text with the color of the referenced object. Only the underline is colored - text color remains as in XML highlighting.

cimRdfLens.underlineWidth.description: Thickness of the underline in pixels.

cimRdfLens.markReferences.description: Also mark lines with rdf:resource on the right with the target color. Default off: the single line bar breaks the continuous block bars and only repeats what the colored underline under the UUID already shows.

cimRdfLens.overviewRuler.description: Also mark blocks in the overview ruler beside the scrollbar.
